# Originyx

Originyx builds premium enterprise AI systems, autonomous multi-agent networks, workflow automation platforms, and business process intelligence tools that help organizations scale without operational complexity.

## Brand Information
- **Domain**: https://originyx.in/
- **Founder & AI Developer**: Sagar M
- **Mission**: Ingesting business complexity and deploying clean, autonomous systems.

## Core Services

- **AI Workflow Automation**: End-to-end automation of manual processes, document pipelines, and business operations using private agentic networks.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/ai-workflow-automation/
- **Custom AI Agents**: Specialized agentic systems designed for sales prospecting (SDR), customer support, operations, and compliance.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/autonomous-agents/
- **Enterprise AI Infrastructure**: Secure Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) platforms with role-based access control, cost-tracking, and audit logs.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/enterprise-rag/
- **AI Receptionists**: WhatsApp and web chatbots for automated lead capturing and conversational qualification.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/ai-receptionist/
- **Lead Generation Automation**: Outbound SDR loops, company scraping, and personalized outreach drafting.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/lead-generation-automation/

## Core Products

- **HunterOS**: An autonomous AI Sales Development Representative (SDR) platform that automates lead generation. It scrapes directories, analyzes target domains, detects pain points, and drafts hyper-personalized cold outreach copy.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/projects/hunteros/
- **HunterOS Engage**: An AI-powered customer engagement platform that qualifies leads, automates follow-ups, and schedules meetings across WhatsApp and web channels, tracking conversions inside a unified dashboard.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/projects/hunteros-engage/
- **Tvira Receptionist (Ojas.ai)**: A 24/7 virtual receptionist and lead capture assistant for coaching centers, training institutes, and academies, running across WhatsApp and web.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/projects/ojas-ai/
- **SwiftRoute AI**: An AI-powered logistics intelligence platform that automates dispatching, schedules routes, and provides real-time fleet analytics.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/projects/swiftroute-ai/
- **ShadowOS**: An operational intelligence platform that runs stealth workflow audits, tracks data leakage, and maps business process bottlenecks.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/projects/shadowos/
- **Enterprise RAG**: A secure document intelligence search engine featuring strict role-based access control, cost monitoring, and complete query observability.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/projects/enterprise-rag/
- **LifeOS**: A personal AI operating system acting as a unified digital command center for productivity, knowledge management, and goal tracking.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/projects/lifeos/
- **Mission Control**: A fleet management console for monitoring and orchestrating autonomous agent clusters and operational pipelines.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/projects/mission-control/
- **Sunny AI Companion**: A child-friendly, safe conversational companion for exploratory learning, creative writing, and gamified education.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/projects/sunny-ai-companion/

## Industry-Specific Solutions

- **AI for Real Estate Brokerages**: Automated lead intake, Zillow lead parsing, property valuation database synchronizations, and active buyer-listing matching.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/ai-for-real-estate/
- **AI for Logistics & Supply Chain**: Multi-stop routing engines, driver WhatsApp dispatch assistants, and real-time cargo delivery dashboards.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/ai-for-logistics/
- **AI Receptionist for Coaching Centers**: WhatsApp chatbots loaded with syllabus and fee documentation to capture and pre-qualify admission leads 24/7.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/ai-for-coaching-centers/

## Local Presence & Service Hubs

- **AI Automation & Development India**: Core consulting services serving Bangalore, Mysore, Hyderabad, Pune, Mumbai, and Delhi NCR with secure, scalable automation projects.
  - URL: https://originyx.in/ai-automation-india/
